name: Rose's Tomato/Onion Dressing
recipeIngredient: 2 tbsp Herb Vinegar (Or Whatever Vinegar you like)
1/2 tbsp Sugar (More or less to taste)
1/2 tsp Citric Acid (optional, for a longer shelf life)
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute Onion and spices in a small amount of veggie broth, wine, or water until transparent and tender.
2. Add tomatoes and onion mixture to blender. Include vinegar and sugar. Blend on low speed.
3. Taste the dressing. Adjust by adding more vinegar, salt, and/or sugar as needed for personal preference.
This makes a nice dressing for any kind of green salad.
